targets.name: disabled gift-card entitlement wins for all supported mutation roots

notes: Executable local-runtime fallback for the gift-card entitlement gate. The available conformance shop cannot be flipped to a disabled gift-card entitlement in-session, and the checked-in Admin API introspection does not expose a public shop.entitlements field. The request starts cold, hydrates a synthetic disabled-entitlement shop through a cassette-backed StorePropertiesShopBaselineHydrate response, then verifies all seven supported gift-card mutation roots return the plan/entitlement userError before their normal validation or gift-card hydration branches run.
